name: Can LLMs Effectively Simulate Human Learners? Teachers' Insights from Tutoring LLM Students
venue: Proceedings of the 20th Workshop on Innovative Use of NLP for Building Educational Applications
summary: BEA 2025 paper using MathDial data analysis and interviews with teachers who tutored LLM-simulated students to identify authenticity gaps in learner simulation.

access_attempts.notes: ACL Anthology PDF was downloaded and text-extracted for sample details, MathDial context, teacher-reported authenticity failures, and limitations.
